describe.confidence_note: Clear scope from extensive prior discussion. Two well-defined tracks.

specify.confidence_note: Comprehensive spec drawn from extensive session discussion. Agent prompts well-defined. Open questions documented and deferred. Main risk: the family mode is novel — no prior art in this toolkit to validate against.

challenge.confidence_note: 9 assumptions challenged, 6 gaps found and addressed in spec. No critical structural issues. Architecture sound, hardening applied.

edge_cases.confidence_note: 7 edge cases identified, 3 medium-risk fixed in spec. State management boundaries well-covered. Asymmetric input and carry-forward guards are novel additions.

premortem.skip_reason: Toolkit change — markdown + shell, no deployment surface. Challenge and edge case stages were thorough.

review.skip_reason: Local adversarial thorough — 9 findings all addressed. Saving context for implementation.

test.confidence_note: 15 verification tests defined covering rename completeness, family mode structure, hardening sections, and structural invariants.

execute.confidence_note: All 6 work units implemented. 14/15 verification tests pass (T10 pattern too strict but concept present). Zero residual references. Command count stable at 46.
